Petition For Preliminary Distribution And For Allow. On Account Of Compensation To Co-Executors And Attorney & Report Of Status Of Admin.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Asis for (petitioners) Kim Hardwick & Marie Hill.

Ms. Asis reported that they are working with an attorney who speaks french to obtain the funds in the french account, that it could take several months, that there is no expectation of litigation and that they are not aware of any additional french accounts. The court expressed concern regarding the substantial distribution and the petition for preliminary distribution, etc., was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
